source_pr.title: Support SQLMode ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY and fix a join panic bug
source_pr.body:
Add ONLY_FULL_GROUP_BY to default sql_mode, and support this sql_mode.

Fix the bug that in buildJoin plan, if rightPlan is nil when buildResultSetNode of join.Right meets error, panic would occur.

symptoms: executor,sessionctx:fix data race for set IgnoreTruncate in Statement… | // test order by (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: executor,sessionctx:fix data race for set IgnoreTruncate in Statement… | // test order by (executor/aggregate_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: executor,sessionctx:fix data race for set IgnoreTruncate in Statement… | // test order by (executor/aggregate_test.go)

files: ast/dml.go, bootstrap.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/prepared.go, executor/show_test.go, executor/write.go, executor/write_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, mysql/const.go, mysql/errcode.go, mysql/errname.go, mysql/state.go, parser/parser.y, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/explain_test.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plans.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/plans.go, session.go, session_test.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go
